Patient Experience Analytics
Workbook Findings Qualtrics Direction Report GitHub

Florida CMS HCAHPS | Reporting period 07/01/2024-06/30/2025

HCAHPS Patient Experience Dashboard

Created by Caroline Howard

Excel dashboard for Florida HCAHPS results. Main finding: Medicine Communication is the priority follow-up area.

Scope Florida hospitals
Data level Hospital reporting data
Primary use Implementation planning
Delivery package
Excel workbook Dashboard, category detail, hospital comparison
Companion report Findings, limitations, Qualtrics survey direction
Admin focus Built to help hospital leaders target improvement action
Download workbook Open report View GitHub

Page flow

How to read this project

  1. Preview
  2. Workbook
  3. Insights
  4. Navigate
  5. Report

1. Excel preview

Actual workbook preview

Rendered from the Excel file.

Dashboard sheet preview

Executive finding

Medication education is the gap.

Nurse and doctor communication score higher than Medicine Communication.

Medicine Communication
58.0% favorable
Side-effect explanation
43.8% favorable
Recommended next step
Patient-level Qualtrics implementation survey

2. What the Excel provides

What the workbook provides

Statewide summary -> submeasure detail -> hospital benchmark.

Dashboard Statewide executive view Ranks major categories and flags the priority area.
Category_Detail Submeasure diagnosis Shows which submeasures drive the category result.
Hospital_Detail Facility benchmark comparison Compares each facility with the Florida average.
README and source tabs Transparent workbook structure Documents scope, definitions, and source tables.

3. Insights from the Excel

Key dashboard insight

Higher favorable response rates are better.

Discharge Information 84.3% Strongest area
Nurse Communication 76.4% Moderate performance
Doctor Communication 74.8% Moderate performance
Recommendation 70.0% Moderate global signal
Overall Rating 69.1% Needs attention
Medicine Communication 58.0% Priority improvement area

4. How the Excel is navigable

Navigation path

  • Dashboard statewide story
  • Category_Detail submeasure drivers
  • Hospital_Detail facility benchmarks
  • README/source methods and source data

5. Report and Qualtrics direction

Use HCAHPS to target patient-level follow-up.

The report connects dashboard findings to Qualtrics implementation questions.

Survey domains

  • New or changed medication at discharge
  • Who explained purpose and side effects
  • When and how the explanation occurred
  • Verbal, written, portal, caregiver, or no explanation
  • Teach-back and patient understanding
  • Who to contact after discharge

Implementation question

If nurse and doctor communication are relatively high, why is side-effect explanation low?

Decision map

Survey to action

Each domain maps to an operational lever.

Survey domain What it diagnoses Possible hospital investment
Role ownership Whether patients know who explained side effects Clarify doctor, nurse, pharmacist, and discharge staff responsibilities
Timing Whether medication education happens early enough to absorb Move medication counseling earlier in discharge workflow
Format Whether education is verbal, written, portal-based, or only patient-initiated Standardize verbal explanation plus plain-language written materials
Patient understanding Whether patients know urgent side effects and next steps Staff teach-back training and clearer side-effect scripts
Follow-up support Whether patients know who to contact after discharge Post-discharge call, text, portal message, or hotline workflow

Artifacts

Workbook and companion report

Download the workbook or read the full insight breakdown.

Download workbook Read report View GitHub repo
Created by Caroline Howard. Public CMS HCAHPS hospital-level reporting data only. No patient-level microdata or Qualtrics response export is included.
